## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content performance, new content requests, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic to Rapyd blogs nearly doubled in the past week (14 clicks to 22)](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Two new blog post requests: "What is a bank redirect?" and "What is a bank transfer?"](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [SEMrush position tracking report set up for GrowthX keywords to monitor rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [XML file for first batch of articles ready; more to be added by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Organic traffic to Rapyd blogs increased from 14 clicks (week 17) to 22 clicks (week 18)](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GA4 data now working correctly, showing bounce rate and engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic issue resolved; breakdown of traffic from different LLMs available](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)

### New Content Requests

  - [Two new blog posts requested by Mark:](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
    1.  "What is a bank redirect?"
    2.  "What is a bank transfer?"
  - [These posts will serve as reference articles for various payment methods Rapyd supports](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [A new "Suggestions" tab will be added to Airtable for future content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### Blog Topics and Subtopics

  - [Current manual process: Mark/Tom assign topic and subtopic when publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Aim to automate or streamline this process](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Mark provided a spreadsheet with topics and subtopics for potential integration](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### SEMrush Position Tracking

  - [New position tracking report set up in SEMrush called "growthx keywords"](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Aida and Nicolette added as users to access the report](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Will help track rankings over time and monitor impact of Google updates](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### XML File Update

  - [First batch of XML file ready with one article](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Three additional reviewed articles to be added to the batch](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Full batch expected to be sent by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to add "Suggestions" tab in Airtable for future content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Kirkland to investigate automating topic/subtopic assignment in content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Mark to share XML document and topics/subtopics spreadsheet in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Aida to refine keyword list in SEMrush position tracking report](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Mark to review more blogs and move them to "Scheduled" status](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring performance metrics and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Vyn1MVzDy5rLfSyV1Ye7L-ERvyy7EWDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
